deep_dive.title: CSTrader: A Testbed for Language-Grounded Trading in a Community-Driven Virtual Asset Market
deep_dive.abstract: Niche asset markets, such as Counter-Strike 2 (CS2) weapon skins, are small, volatile, and heavily driven by community discussions and platform rules. These properties make them hard for traditional quantitative models, but provide an ideal testbed for studying how large language models (LLMs) turn unstructured text into trading actions. We present CSTrader, a multi-agent framework for language-grounded trading in the CS2 skin market. The system first integrates heterogeneous signals from various sources, then uses specialized agents for technical analysis, liquidity, events, and (reversed) sentiment, and finally applies risk control, transaction friction, and portfolio management agents to produce buy, sell, or hold decisions under realistic trading frictions. We build a live-like evaluation environment with real CS2 data from a highly volatile period and evaluate several recent LLM backbones. Across models, CSTrader consistently outperforms both a falling market index (-15.62%) and simple single-prompt LLM baselines, achieving up to a 7.58% cumulative return with controlled risk. Ablation studies show that liquidity, reversed sentiment, and transaction friction agents are crucial for turning noisy language signals into stable profits, suggesting that niche, language-driven markets are a useful benchmark for future language-to-action research. Code is available at: https://github.com/IatomicreactorI/CSGOTrading?tab=readme-ov-file#quick-start
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Multi-agent framework for language-grounded trading in a virtual market, a task-oriented financial agent system
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 面向虚拟市场交易的多智能体框架，属于任务导向型金融智能体系统
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 面向虚拟市场交易的多智能体框架，属于任务导向型金融智能体系统
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 面向虚拟市场交易的多智能体框架，属于任务导向型金融智能体系统
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: CSTrader is a multi-agent framework for LLM-based trading in the CS2 skin market, integrating technical analysis, liquidity, events, and sentiment agents with risk control to produce buy/sell/hold decisions. It provides a testbed for task-oriented financial agents.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 针对社区驱动虚拟资产市场难以通过量化模型建模的问题，CSTrader提出一个多智能体框架，利用大语言模型将社区讨论等非结构化文本转化为交易决策。系统集成技术分析、流动性、事件和情绪等多种专业智能体，并加入风控与投资组合管理机制。在CS2皮肤市场的实验中展示了LLM驱动金融任务型智能体的潜力。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 针对社区驱动虚拟资产市场难以通过量化模型建模的问题，CSTrader提出一个多智能体框架，利用大语言模型将社区讨论等非结构化文本转化为交易决策。系统集成技术分析、流动性、事件和情绪等多种专业智能体，并加入风控与投资组合管理机制。在CS2皮肤市场的实验中展示了LLM驱动金融任务型智能体的潜力。

quick_skim.title: ARKD: Adaptive Reinforcement Learning-Guided Bidirectional KL Divergence Distillation for Text Generation
quick_skim.abstract: Knowledge distillation (KD) is a key technique for compressing Large Language Models (LLMs), yet methods relying on a single KL objective often fail to balance primary distribution fitting with long-tail probability modeling, limiting both generation quality and generalization. To address this, we analyze the complementary roles of forward and reverse KL divergence (FKL/RKL) in distribution alignment from theoretical and empirical perspectives. We then propose a reinforcement-learning-based adaptive KL-weighted distillation framework, in which a policy network dynamically assigns weights to FKL and RKL based on teacher-student distributional characteristics, guided by immediate reward signals to achieve dual alignment on principal and long-tail modes. Extensive experiments demonstrate consistent improvements across Rouge-L and BertScore metrics, surpassing greedy heuristics by 0.4-0.6 points and outperforming other baseline methods on diverse benchmarks.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: RL-based distillation method as a general post-training technique for LLMs, applicable to agent models
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 基于强化学习的自适应蒸馏方法，作为LLM的后训练技术，可应用于智能体模型
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 基于强化学习的自适应蒸馏方法，作为LLM的后训练技术，可应用于智能体模型
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 基于强化学习的自适应蒸馏方法，作为LLM的后训练技术，可应用于智能体模型
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: ARKD proposes an adaptive RL-guided method that dynamically weights forward and reverse KL divergence in knowledge distillation, improving text generation quality and generalization over single-KL objectives.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对现有知识蒸馏方法使用单一KL目标难以平衡主分布拟合与长尾概率建模的问题，ARKD提出一种基于强化学习的自适应KL加权蒸馏框架。通过策略网络根据教师和学生分布特征动态分配前向与反向KL散度权重，以即时奖励信号实现双重对齐。实验表明该方法在文本生成质量和泛化能力上均优于传统蒸馏方法，为LLM的后训练压缩提供了一种有效技术。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对现有知识蒸馏方法使用单一KL目标难以平衡主分布拟合与长尾概率建模的问题，ARKD提出一种基于强化学习的自适应KL加权蒸馏框架。通过策略网络根据教师和学生分布特征动态分配前向与反向KL散度权重，以即时奖励信号实现双重对齐。实验表明该方法在文本生成质量和泛化能力上均优于传统蒸馏方法，为LLM的后训练压缩提供了一种有效技术。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: techniques for post-training of autonomous agents

quick_skim.title: RusFinChain: A Russian Benchmark for Verifiable Chain-of-Thought Reasoning in Finance with Fuzzy-Aligned Evaluation
quick_skim.abstract: Multi-step symbolic reasoning is essential for robust financial analysis, yet most benchmarks neglect intermediate reasoning steps. FINCHAIN introduced verifiable Chain-of-Thought (CoT) evaluation but is limited to English. FINESSE-Bench includes a Russian block but relies on multiple-choice questions without step-level supervision. We present RusFinChain, the first Russian-language symbolic benchmark for verifiable CoT reasoning in finance. It spans 17 domains, 172 topics, and comprises 5,280 parameterized examples from executable Python templates, ensuring contamination-free evaluation. Each example includes a gold-standard reasoning chain with intermediate numeric values for automatic verification. We also introduce enhanced metrics: Fuzzy Numeric Alignment and Soft-Attention Alignment. We evaluate 8 open-weight LLMs on a stratified sample, generating 8,100 responses. Results reveal a substantial reasoning gap: models achieve Hard F1 of ~0.65 for step alignment, but only ~29% of final answers are correct. Our fuzzy and soft metrics show stronger correlation with final-answer correctness (Spearman rho approx 0.48) than the original ChainEval (rho approx 0.38-0.46), demonstrating superior diagnostic power. We release dataset, code, and evaluation framework to foster verifiable financial AI for the Russian-speaking community.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Russian finance benchmark for verifiable CoT reasoning, provides training data for financial LLM post-training
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 俄语金融可验证思维链推理基准，为金融LLM后训练提供数据
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 俄语金融可验证思维链推理基准，为金融LLM后训练提供数据
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 俄语金融可验证思维链推理基准，为金融LLM后训练提供数据
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Presents RusFinChain, a Russian benchmark for verifiable chain-of-thought reasoning in finance, with 5,280 parameterized examples and gold reasoning chains, enabling step-level evaluation and potential instruction tuning.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 现有金融推理基准缺乏可验证的中间步骤且多限于英语，本文提出RusFinChain，首个俄语金融可验证思维链基准。覆盖17个领域、172个主题，包含5280个由可执行Python模板生成的参数化示例，每个示例自带含金标准推理链。结合模糊对齐评估，支持自动分步验证。该基准为金融大模型的后训练（如指令微调）提供了高质量、无污染的数据资源，并推动了多语种金融推理研究。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 现有金融推理基准缺乏可验证的中间步骤且多限于英语，本文提出RusFinChain，首个俄语金融可验证思维链基准。覆盖17个领域、172个主题，包含5280个由可执行Python模板生成的参数化示例，每个示例自带含金标准推理链。结合模糊对齐评估，支持自动分步验证。该基准为金融大模型的后训练（如指令微调）提供了高质量、无污染的数据资源，并推动了多语种金融推理研究。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: Papers central to 请帮我查找六个月内主题与金融领域内大模型、智能体后训练相关的论文, especially work that connects or combines: techniques for post-training of autonomous agents; RLHF methods for financial domain adaptation; instruction tuning of large models for financial tasks; alignment techniques for financial AI agents; training conversational agents for finance with multi-turn dialogues; task-oriented agents for financial domain; post training techniques for financial agents using large language models; fine tuning and alignment methods for financial large model agents; reinforcement learning based post training of agents in finance.
